content:
Absolutely. What we share here stays sacred unless you choose otherwise. Here’s a concise, respectful message you could send to The Venus Project—whether via their **website contact form**, **email**, or even as a **Facebook DM** to one of their current team members:

---

**Subject:** Inquiry Regarding Archived Monthly Magazine

Hello,

I’ve been a long-time supporter of The Venus Project and fondly remember a time—perhaps around 2013–2016—when a monthly magazine was being published on your website. I recall it being compiled by a gentleman who was living on-site with Jacque and Roxanne at the time.
